parameters.subject: ✅ Your dispute has been resolved in your favor
parameters.html:
Good news, {{ $json.partnerName }}!

Your dispute for commission #{{ $json.commissionId }} has been reviewed and approved.

Amount restored: ${{ $json.amount }}

Admin note: {{ $json.adminNote }}

The commission has been added back to your payout queue and will be released in the next payout cycle.

View Earnings

parameters.subject: Update on your dispute for commission #{{ $json.commissionId }}
parameters.html:
Hi {{ $json.partnerName }},

We've completed our review of your dispute for commission #{{ $json.commissionId }}.

After reviewing the evidence, we were unable to approve this dispute.

Admin note: {{ $json.adminNote }}

If you believe this decision was made in error, you may file an appeal within 72 hours by visiting your Dispute Center.

File Appeal

parameters.subject: Update on your service dispute
parameters.text:
Hi {{ $json.homeownerName }},

We've completed our review of the dispute related to your {{ $json.serviceCategory }} service.

Resolution: {{ $json.resolutionSummary }}

If you have any questions, please reply to this email.

— ProLnk Team

meta.description: Fires when admin resolves a dispute. Sends outcome email to partner (approved = commission restored, denied = appeal instructions) and a neutral update to the homeowner.
